en: Not a word, not a word, not a word now. Quiet. Donations.
ko: 말하지 마, 말하지 마, 지금은 조용히 해. 기부금.

en: You want me to make a donation
to the Coast Guard Youth Auxiliary. Doc, I'm from the future.
ko: 해양경비대 청소년 보조단에. 닥터, 나는 미래에서 왔어.

en: I came here in a time machine that you invented.
Now I need your help to get back to the year 1985.
Oh, do you know what this means?
It means that this damn thing doesn't work at all. Doc, you gotta help me.
ko: 이 빌어먹을 게 전혀 작동하지 않는다는 뜻이야. 닥터, 제발 도와줘.

en: You are the only one who knows how your time machine works. Time machine?
ko: 네가 타임머신이 어떻게 작동하는지 아는 유일한 사람이야. 타임머신?

en: I haven't invented any time machine.
Okay, all right, I'll prove it to you. Look at my driver's license.
ko: 좋아, 알겠어, 증명해줄게. 내 운전면허증을 봐.

en: Expires 1987. Look at my birthday, for crying out loud.
I haven't even been born yet.
